poplib/POP3/dele.name: dele
poplib/POP3/dele.description: Flag message number which for deletion. On most servers deletions are not actually performed until QUIT (the major exception is Eudora QPOP, which deliberately violates the RFCs by doing pending deletes on any disconnect).
